executive_summary.top_fix: Wi-Fi dead zones in east wing (rooms 7-11) - appears in 21% of reviews and drags down average score among affected guests.

praise_themes.title: Courtyard & Garden Atmosphere
praise_themes.description: Guests consistently single out the central courtyard - specifically the fountain, the flowering vines, and the arrangement of seating - as the defining experience of the stay.
sample_quotes: The courtyard alone is worth the stay. I had my morning coffee there every day and genuinely didn't want to leave.
Something about that fountain running all day. I slept better than I have in years.

praise_themes.title: Staff Warmth & Personalization
praise_themes.description: Staff are named individually in 21 reviews - unusual for an 18-room property and a strong signal of exceptional service culture.
sample_quotes: Marco at the front desk remembered that I mentioned wanting to see the jade market and had already printed me a map the next morning.

praise_themes.title: Breakfast Experience
praise_themes.description: The included breakfast receives specific praise for using local ingredients, preparation quality, and the setting.
sample_quotes: The tamales at breakfast were the best I had in a week in Guatemala. And that's saying something.

praise_themes.title: Location within Antigua
praise_themes.description: Walkability to the main square, market, and key restaurants noted as a practical advantage.

praise_themes.title: Room Comfort & Colonial Aesthetic
praise_themes.description: Guests praise locally crafted textiles, thick walls keeping rooms cool, and attention to decorative detail.

reputation_risks.title: Wi-Fi Dead Zones in Courtyard-Adjacent Rooms
reputation_risks.description: Disproportionate drag on overall score. Low-cost mesh network fix estimated.

reputation_risks.title: Inconsistent Hot Water in Three Rooms
reputation_risks.description: Recurring source of 1-2 star reviews. Infrastructure fix needed.

reputation_risks.title: Noise Bleed from Street-Facing Rooms on Weekend Evenings
reputation_risks.description: Partially uncontrollable. Proactive check-in communication and room reassignment option recommended.

reputation_risks.title: Checkout Process Feels Rushed
reputation_risks.description: Single-staff morning shifts create impersonal checkout. Process adjustment recommended.

reputation_risks.title: No Parking Guidance in Pre-Arrival Communication
reputation_risks.description: One paragraph added to confirmation email would eliminate this category.

guest_language: thick stone walls keep it cool
the kind of hotel you tell everyone about
the fountain was still running when I fell asleep

marketing_opportunities.title: Lead with the Courtyard, Not the Rooms
marketing_opportunities.description: Reorder photo sequence - courtyard first, interior second. Rewrite opening description.

marketing_opportunities.title: Book Direct for Courtyard Room Preference
marketing_opportunities.description: Offer courtyard room preference as direct-booking benefit. Costs nothing, bypasses OTA fees.

marketing_opportunities.title: Breakfast-as-Content Series
marketing_opportunities.description: Weekly morning table post. Breakfast praised in 54% of reviews but appears in <10% of Instagram posts.

marketing_opportunities.title: Return to the Courtyard - Past Guest Reactivation
marketing_opportunities.description: Segment guests 12+ months since stay. One email, one offer.

marketing_opportunities.title: Actively Solicit Reviews Post-Breakfast
marketing_opportunities.description: Handwritten card at breakfast table with QR code. Morning emotional peak outperforms checkout-time asks.

marketing_opportunities.title: Colonial Architecture + Local Food Angle
marketing_opportunities.description: Clear editorial appeal for Central America authenticity travel publications.

listing_alignment.summary: Casa Mariposa's public listings generally reinforce its boutique scale, Antigua location, colonial character, and breakfast strength, but the courtyard and breakfast experience should work harder as marketplace conversion signals.
aligned_strengths: Boutique hotel scale and personal service
underused_review_backed_themes: Courtyard as the primary emotional hook
Breakfast as a standout F&B experience
Courtyard room preference as a direct-booking benefit

expectation_gaps.evidence: A small but recurring set of reviews mentions parking or arrival confusion.
expectation_gaps.recommendation: Add parking and arrival guidance to listing descriptions where possible, then reinforce it in confirmation emails.

fnb_listing_opportunities.evidence: Breakfast appears in 54% of reviews and is frequently described with specific local-food language.
fnb_listing_opportunities.recommendation: Treat breakfast as a conversion asset across listing descriptions, gallery order, and social content.

direct_booking_implications: Courtyard room preference can become a direct-booking benefit.
Guest-backed breakfast language can improve conversion copy.
Parking guidance can reduce avoidable arrival friction.

source_ecosystem.summary: Optional paid module. A capped 3-5 query source check would focus on whether Casa Mariposa appears in relevant boutique hotel, breakfast, and romantic stay discovery sources.

opportunities.why_it_matters: Courtyard and colonial character are already review-backed.
opportunities.recommended_action: Identify relevant list sources and prepare a concise outreach/photo pitch.

opportunities.why_it_matters: Breakfast appears in 54% of reviews and has specific local-food language.
opportunities.recommended_action: Strengthen owned breakfast and listing language before outreach.

source_ecosystem.scope_note: Review only the top 1-3 promising pages per query. Not automated crawling, broad SEO auditing, ranking proof, or AI visibility tracking.

priority_actions.action: Resolve Wi-Fi dead zones in east wing (rooms 7-11)
priority_actions.expected_impact: +0.3-0.5 aggregate review score; eliminates 21% of negative mentions

priority_actions.action: Address hot water inconsistency in rooms 3, 4, and 6
priority_actions.expected_impact: Eliminates recurring 1-2 star reviews from those rooms

priority_actions.action: Reorder OTA photo sequence - courtyard images to positions 1-3
priority_actions.expected_impact: Aligns first impression with top conversion driver

priority_actions.action: Add parking guidance paragraph to pre-arrival email
Develop 'Return to the Courtyard' email campaign for past guests
priority_actions.expected_impact: Direct booking revenue from highest-intent audience

priority_actions.action: Update website hero and property description with guest-informed copy
